---
title: "Data Viz Final Project: Pharmacies in Chicago"
format: html
---

```{python}
# load packages
import geopandas as gpd
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from shapely import wkt
#import pydeck as pdk
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import altair as alt
import streamlit as st
```


```{python}
# load 2010 census data
#JESSICA'S FILE PATH:
#census_2010_gdf = gpd.read_file('C:\\Users\\blueb\\final_project_AWJP_w26\\data\\raw-data\\CensusTractsTIGER2010_20260303.geojson')

#ARIANNA'S FILE PATH:
census_2010_gdf = gpd.read_file('/Users/ariannawooten/Downloads/final_project_AWJP_w26/data/raw-data/CensusTractsTIGER2010_20260303.geojson')
```

```{python}
# explore 2010 census data
census_2010_gdf.shape

# count geometry by type
print('Geometry type:', census_2010_gdf.geom_type)

# count total number of features
print('\n N features:', len(census_2010_gdf))

# get crs
print('\n Coordinate reference system:', census_2010_gdf.crs)

print(census_2010_gdf.head())
print(census_2010_gdf.columns)
```

```{python}
# create basic visualization (Chicago census tract map)
census_2010_gdf.plot().set_axis_off()
```


```{python}
# load data
#JESSICA'S DATA PATH
#data_path = 'C:\\Users\\blueb\\final_project_AWJP_w26\\data\\raw-data\\Pharmacy_Status_-_Historical_20260302.csv'

#ARIANNA'S DATA PATH
data_path = '/Users/ariannawooten/Downloads/final_project_AWJP_w26/data/raw-data/Pharmacy_Status_-_Historical_20260302.csv'

df_pharm = pd.read_csv(data_path)
```

```{python}
# explore data
df_pharm.shape
df_pharm.head()
```

```{python}
# check pharmacy status
df_pharm['Status'].unique()

# create mapping for pharmacy status
mapping = {
    'OPEN':'Open',
    'CLOSED': 'Closed',
    'Permanently closed': 'Closed',
    'closed': 'Closed',
    'open': 'Open',
    'permanently closed': 'Closed',
    'unknown': 'Unknown'
}

# recode the status column
df_pharm['Status'] = df_pharm['Status'].replace(mapping)
```

```{python}
# make pharmacy names capitalized
df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'] = df_pharm['Pharmacy Name'].str.capitalize()
```


```{python}
# load pharmacies as a geodataframe

# drop nas
df_pharm = df_pharm.dropna(subset=['New Georeferenced Column'])

# drop na strings
df_pharm = df_pharm[
    df_pharm['New Georeferenced Column']
    .str.lower()
    .ne('nan')
]

# convert wkt to a geometry
df_pharm['geometry'] = gpd.GeoSeries.from_wkt(
    df_pharm['New Georeferenced Column'],
    on_invalid='ignore'
)

# drop failed parses
df_pharm = df_pharm.dropna(subset=['geometry'])

# create geodataframe
pharm_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    df_pharm,
    geometry='geometry',
    crs='EPSG:4326'
)

# sanity check
print(df_pharm.shape)
print(df_pharm.head())
```



```{python}
# join pharmacy location and census tract gdfs (pharmacy emphasis)
combined1_gdf = gpd.sjoin(pharm_gdf, census_2010_gdf, 
    how='left',
    predicate='within')

# check object type
print('Object type:', type(combined1_gdf))

# check geometry type
print('\nGeometry type:', combined1_gdf.geom_type.value_counts())
```

```{python}
assert (census_2010_gdf.crs == pharm_gdf.crs)
```

```{python}
# set up plot (Chicago Pharmacy Distribution on census map)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8,6))

# plot chicago in blue
census_2010_gdf.plot(ax=ax, color='lightblue', alpha=0.5)

# plot pharmacies
pharm_gdf.plot(
    ax=ax,
    column='Status',
    categorical=True,
    legend=True,
    markersize=5,
    alpha=0.7
)
plt.title('Chicago Pharmacy Distribution')
plt.tight_layout()

ax.set_axis_off()
plt.show()
```


```{python}
# other sjoin option

# join gdfs (alternative merge with more census data and less pharm data)
combined2_gdf = gpd.sjoin(census_2010_gdf, pharm_gdf, 
    how='left',
    predicate='intersects')

# check object type
print('Object type:', type(combined2_gdf))

# check geometry type
print('\nGeometry type:', combined2_gdf.geom_type.value_counts())
```


```{python}
combined2_gdf.head()
```


```{python}
# group data by census tract
pharm_by_tract = (
    combined1_gdf
    .groupby('geoid10')
    .size()
    .reset_index(name='pharmacy_count')
)

# count pharmacies per census tract
pharm_by_tract.shape
```

```{python}
# count pharmacies per tract
pharm_counts = (
    combined1_gdf
    .groupby('tractce10')
    .size()
    .reset_index(name='pharmacy_count')
)
```

```{python}
# merge counts back to census polygons
census_and_pharm_gdf = census_2010_gdf.merge(
    pharm_counts,
    on='tractce10',
    how='left'
)

# fill missing tracts with zero pharmacies
census_and_pharm_gdf['pharmacy_count'] = (
    census_and_pharm_gdf['pharmacy_count']
    .fillna(0)
)
```

```{python}
# project to crs in meters
census_and_pharm_gdf = census_and_pharm_gdf.to_crs(epsg=26916)

# calculate area in square miles
census_and_pharm_gdf['area_sq_miles'] = (
    census_and_pharm_gdf.geometry.area / 2_589_988
)

# compute density
census_and_pharm_gdf['pharm_density'] = (
    census_and_pharm_gdf['pharmacy_count'] /
    census_and_pharm_gdf['area_sq_miles']
)
```


```{python}
# make choropleth map (pharm density per square mile)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10,10))

census_and_pharm_gdf.plot(
    column='pharm_density',
    cmap='OrRd',
    scheme='quantiles',
    k=5,
    legend=True,
    linewidth=0.1,
    edgecolor='grey',
    ax=ax
)

# add legend title
leg = ax.get_legend()
leg.set_title("Pharmacies per Square Mile")

ax.set_title('Pharmacy Density per Square Mile\nChicago 2010 Census Tracts')
ax.axis('off')
plt.tight_layout()

plt.show()
```


```{python}
# load population csv
df_pop = pd.read_csv('C:\\Users\\blueb\\final_project_AWJP_w26\\data\\raw-data\\Population_by_2010_Census_Block_20260302.csv')

df_pop.head()
```



```{python}
# create a function to convert
def blocks_to_tracts(df_pop, geoid_col='CENSUS BLOCK FULL'): 
    df = df_pop.copy()

    # ensure geoid is string
    df[geoid_col] = df[geoid_col].astype(str).str.zfill(15)

    # convert population to numeric
    df['TOTAL POPULATION'] = pd.to_numeric(
        df['TOTAL POPULATION'],
        errors='coerce'
    )

    # extract tract geoid
    df['geoid10'] = df[geoid_col].str[:11]

    # group by tract and sum numeric values
    tract_df = (
        df
        .groupby('geoid10', as_index=False)['TOTAL POPULATION']
        .sum()
    )

    return tract_df
```


```{python}
# recode population census blocks to census tracts
pop_tract_df = blocks_to_tracts(df_pop)
pop_tract_df.head()
```

```{python}
# merge census tract populations to census and pharm gdf
cen_tract_pop_gdf = census_and_pharm_gdf.merge(pop_tract_df,
on='geoid10',
how='outer'
)
```

```{python}
# create col of number of pharmacies per 1000 residents
cen_tract_pop_gdf['pharm_per_1000'] = (
    cen_tract_pop_gdf['pharmacy_count'] / 
    cen_tract_pop_gdf['TOTAL POPULATION']
) * 1000

cen_tract_pop_gdf.head()
```

```{python}
# make plot of pharmacies per 1000 residents in each census tract
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10,10))

cen_tract_pop_gdf.plot(
    column='pharm_per_1000',
    cmap='OrRd',
    scheme='quantiles',
    k=5,
    legend=True,
 #   legend_kwds={'label': 'Pharmacies Per 1000 Residents'},
    linewidth=0.1,
    edgecolor='grey',
    ax=ax
)

# add legend title
leg = ax.get_legend()
leg.set_title("Pharmacies per 1000 Residents")

ax.set_title('Pharmacy Density per 1000 Residents\nChicago 2010 Census Tracts')
ax.axis('off')
plt.tight_layout()

plt.show()
```



```{python}
# load health data
df_health = pd.read_csv('C:\\Users\\blueb\\final_project_AWJP_w26\\data\\raw-data\\Chicago Health Atlas Data Download - Census Tracts.csv')
```

```{python}
# explore health data
df_health.shape
print(df_health.head)
print(df_health.columns)
```











```{python}
# load gdf
census_2000_gdf = gpd.read_file('C:\\Users\\blueb\\final_project_AWJP_w26\\data\\raw-data\\Census_Tracts_20260302.geojson')
```

```{python}
# inspect data

# count geometry by type
print('Geometry type:', census_2000_gdf.geom_type)

# count total number of features
print('\n N features:', len(census_2000_gdf))

# get crs
print('\n Coordinate reference system:', census_2000_gdf.crs)

print(census_2000_gdf.head())
print(census_2000_gdf.columns)
```

```{python}
# create basic visualization
census_gdf.plot().set_axis_off()
```

```{python}
# join gdfs
combined3_gdf = gpd.sjoin(pharm_gdf, census_2000_gdf, 
    how='left',
    predicate='within')

# check object type
print('Object type:', type(combined3_gdf))

# check geometry type
print('\nGeometry type:', combined3_gdf.geom_type.value_counts())
```

```{python}
# group data by census tract
pharm_by_tract2 = (
    combined3_gdf
    .groupby('census_t_1')
    .size()
    .reset_index(name='pharmacy_count')
)

# count pharmacies per census tract
pharm_by_tract2.shape
```

```{python}
pharm_by_tract2.columns
```

```{python}
# count pharmacies per tract
pharm_counts2 = (
    combined3_gdf
    .groupby('tract_ce_3')
    .size()
    .reset_index(name='pharmacy_count')
)
```
